usage.blender: Import as VSE timeline markers: one marker per occurrence at startFrame30 (30fps timeline), labeled cutId + cutLabel. Use sequences.<name>.occurrences[].startFrame30/endFrame30.
usage.unity: Import as Timeline markers or a signal-emitter track: one marker per occurrence at startSec, firing audioRefs/triggers for HUD/narration sync.
usage.generic: sequences.<name>.occurrences is a flat, time-ordered list per sequence variant (mainline/ending_branch_b/cut_only); each entry carries its own cut metadata, so no cross-reference into storyboard-motion-sound-matrix.json is required for playback sync.
